description: Discovery reduces risk before committing to delivery. These discovery tracks test whether a potential solution is valuable, viable, usable, and feasible.

riskFramework.question: Will customers buy the product and/or choose to use it?
Will the solution meet the needs of the business?
Can customers figure out how to use it?
Can we build it within given resources and constraints?

items.name: Formulation Workbench: Nutritionist / Formulation Manager (Power User) validated discovery
items.summary: Discovery work for Formulation Workbench is reducing uncertainty before delivery investment by testing demand, business fit, usability, and buildability for Nutritionist / Formulation Manager (Power User).
items.opportunity: Clarify whether stronger ingredient & nutrient data model and spec management (product & material) create enough customer and business value to justify further delivery across web, Recipe API.

linkedInitiatives.description: Formulation Workbench initiative focused on improving ingredient & nutrient data model, spec management (product & material), strengthening customer value for Nutritionist / Formulation Manager (Power User), and evolving delivery across web, Recipe API.

assignments.how: Led the discovery framing, synthesis, and recommendation that shaped how Formulation Workbench moved forward for Nutritionist / Formulation Manager (Power User).
Supported the discovery with validation on ingredient & nutrient data model and spec management (product & material), helping close the main delivery risks.
Supported the discovery with validation on ingredient & nutrient data model and spec management (product & material), helping close the main delivery risks.
Supported the discovery with validation on ingredient & nutrient data model and spec management (product & material), helping close the main delivery risks.

riskFocus.question: Will customers buy the product and/or choose to use it?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Nutritionist / Formulation Manager (Power User) will choose Formulation Workbench because ingredient & nutrient data model and spec management (product & material) solve a high-friction workflow.
evidenceToCollect: Whether Nutritionist / Formulation Manager (Power User) describes ingredient & nutrient data model as a top priority problem.
Whether concept tests show intent to adopt or pay for the improved Formulation Workbench experience.

riskFocus.question: Will the solution meet the needs of the business?
riskFocus.hypothesis: The business can justify investment in Formulation Workbench if ingredient & nutrient data model and spec management (product & material) improve target KPIs without creating unacceptable operating cost.
evidenceToCollect: What commercial, compliance, or operational constraints affect the Formulation Workbench case.
Which KPI movement did make the solution worth funding.

riskFocus.question: Can customers figure out how to use it?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Nutritionist / Formulation Manager (Power User) can understand and complete the core Formulation Workbench workflow with minimal guidance.
evidenceToCollect: Where users hesitate or need explanation in prototypes covering ingredient & nutrient data model and spec management (product & material).
Whether the workflow language, navigation, and sequencing are clear enough for first-time use.

riskFocus.question: Can we build it within given resources and constraints?
riskFocus.hypothesis: The teams can deliver the smallest useful version of Formulation Workbench within current technology, staffing, and dependency constraints.
evidenceToCollect: Which architecture, integration, or data constraints sit behind ingredient & nutrient data model and spec management (product & material).
Whether delivery can be sliced into a realistic first release.

plannedActivities: Interview target users from the Nutritionist / Formulation Manager (Power User) segment about current workflow pain and willingness to switch.
Prototype and test the end-to-end journey covering ingredient & nutrient data model and spec management (product & material).
Run a business and delivery review to define the smallest viable slice across web, Recipe API.
items.decisionToMake: Decide whether to proceed, narrow, or stop further investment in this Formulation Workbench opportunity.

outcome.summary: Discovery confirmed enough signal to proceed into scoped delivery with clearer risk boundaries.
